text.tspan: Inequality-adjusted Human Development Index vs. Human Development
The Human Development Index (HDI) is a summary measure of key dimensions of human development: a long and healthy life, a
good education, and a decent standard of living. The Inequality-adjusted Human Development Index (IHDI) is adjusted for
Data source: UNDP, Human Development Report (2024)
